sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: BANK OF MONTREAL /CAN/의 공시는 사업·재무 업데이트와 주요 확인사항을 제공합니다.

keyPoints.text: BANK OF MONTREAL /CAN/는 최근 사업·재무 업데이트를 공시했습니다.

riskChanges.text: 위험요인 또는 공시 본문은 규제, 사업 운영, 계약 구조 관련 불확실성을 확인합니다.

businessChanges.text: 사업 및 영업 검토는 제품, 시장, 매출 구조 또는 운영 업데이트를 설명합니다.

financialHighlights.text: 공시는 실적, 배당, 매출 또는 재무 업데이트 관련 내용을 제공합니다.

watchItems.text: 향후 확인할 점은 이번 공시의 사업 업데이트가 다음 실적과 현금흐름으로 이어지는지입니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 q22026earningsrelease.htm EX-99.1 Document BMO Financial Group Reports Second Quarter 2026 Results EARNINGS RELEASE BMO’s Second Quarter 2026 Report to Shareholders, including the unaudited interim consolidated financial statements for the period ended April 30, 2026, are available online at www.bmo.com/investorrelations, on the Canadian Securities Administrators’ website at www.sedarplus.ca, and on the EDGAR section of the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission’s website at www.sec.gov. Financial Results Highlights Second Quarter 2026 compared with Second Quarter 2025: • Reported  Normalized numeric aliases: $2,630 million = 26억 3,000만 달러; $1,962 million = 19억 6,200만 달러; $2,733 million = 27억 3,300만 달러; $2,046 million = 20억 4,600만 달러; $2,630 = 2,630달러; $1,962 = 1,962달러; $2,733 = 2,733달러; $2,046 = 2,046달러; $2.50 = 2.50달러; 2,733 million = 27억 3,300만 달러; $3.67 = 3.67달러; $2.62 = 2.62달러; 2,630 million = 26억 3,000만 달러; 1,962 million = 19억 6,200만 달러; 2,046 million = 20억 4,600만 달러.

Earnings Release 1 businesses for cash consideration and an earn-out contingent upon the business achieving specified future performance targets. BMO will use a portion of the consideration to invest an approximate 19.9% equity interest in the new entity. The transaction met the accounting requirements for assets held for sale in the third quarter of fiscal 2026, and as a result, we expect to recognize a charge of approximately $1.1 billion pre-tax ($0.9 billion after-tax), primarily related to goodwill recorded in Corporate Services and treated as an adjusting item. The final amount is subject to closing adjustments and foreign exchange rates prevailing at the date of closing. This transaction is expected to close in the fourth quarter of fiscal 2026, subject to regulatory approvals and customary closing conditions. Second Quarter 2026 Performance Review Adjusted results and ratios in  Normalized numeric aliases: $1.1 billion = 11억 달러; $0.9 billion = 9억 달러; $1.1 = 1.1달러; $0.9 = 0.9달러.
